corrections.note: Word is split across line break in print as ἄνοι- / ντοι, not with an extra hyphen retained inside the transcription.
Relative pronoun has grave accent in the print.

corrections.current: Ὦ μήτηρ δὲ εὐσέβειαν θεοῦ στρατιῶτι,
corrections.correct: Ὦ μήτηρ δὲ εὐσέβειαν θεοῦ στρατιῶτι

Reference number may be 17, 23 in print; retained but flagged due to slight uncertainty in the image. No change to text.
Closing bracket is square, not parenthesis.
Separator follows this note in the apparatus.
Transcript badly misread the variant; print reads απεπλανησατε ℵ, matching the body context.

notes: Running head matches. Body generally accurate; left-margin line numbers are present in transcript but function as line indicators from the scan, not verse numbers. Apparatus has a few typographical misreadings, especially at line 18.
